memoryArtifacts.headline: Will of William Echols, 1771
memoryArtifacts.description:
Halifax County - Will Book O p.310 
WILL OF WILLIAM ECHOLS - Dated: 8 Apr 1771; Prob: 16 May 1771

Lend to Sarah Echols [Sarah TURNER], my wife, the land I now live on plus my corn mill & all my movea …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Echols於1704年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州金 安德 昆恩時，他的父親John Echols, Jr.54歲，母親Mary Cave43歲。他於大約1720年與Sarah Turner在美國維吉尼亞州結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1771年4月8日在美國維吉尼亞州哈利法可哈利法可享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Echols于1704年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州金 安德 昆恩时，他的父亲John Echols, Jr.54岁，母亲Mary Cave43岁。他于大约1720年与Sarah Turner在美国弗吉尼亚州结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1771年4月8日在美国弗吉尼亚州哈利法可哈利法可享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Echols
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Eccles   and possibly also of German   Eckels  .

variants.name: Eccles
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Eccles in Lancashire, or possibly from any of several other places so named in Kent, Norfolk, Berwickshire, and Dumfriesshire, from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’). Such places would have been the sites of notable pre-Anglo-Saxon churches or Christian places of communal worship.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.

en.lifeSummary: When William Echols was born in 1704, in King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, John Echols, Jr., was 54 and his mother, Mary Cave, was 43. He married Sarah Turner about 1720, in Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 8 April 1771, in Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, United States, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Echols est né en 1704, à King and Queen, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Echols, Jr., avait 54 ans et sa mère, Mary Cave, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Turner environ 1720, à Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1771, à Halifax, Halifax, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 67 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Echols è nato il nel 1704 nel King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America, il suo padre, John Echols, Jr., aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Mary Cave, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Turner circa 1720, nel Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1771, nel Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Echolsが1704年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州キング アンド クイーンで生まれた時，父John Echols, Jr.は54歳，母Mary Caveは43歳であった。約1720年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州でSarah Turnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1771年4月8日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ハリファックスハリファックスで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Echols(이)가 1704년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 킨그 앤드 퀸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Echols, Jr.(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Cave(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1720년 미국 버지니아 주에서 Sarah Turner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1771년 4월 8일 미국 버지니아 주 할이파스 할이파스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Echols nasceu em 1704, em King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Echols, Jr., tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Mary Cave, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Turner aproximadamente 1720, em Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1771, em Halifax, Halifax, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Echols родился в 1704 г. в местности кинг анд куин, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени John Echols, Jr. было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Cave, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Turner около 1720 г. в местности Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 8 апреля 1771 г. в местности хэлифакс, хэлифакс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Echols nació en 1704, en King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, John Echols, Jr., tenía 54 años y su mamá, Mary Cave, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Sarah Turner aproximadamente 1720, en Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 8 de abril de 1771, en Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 67 años.
